title: Sugar's Spell Shatters
description: Pages 7–11 focus on sugar's spell shatters, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Sugar, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the country erupts after Sugar's spell breaks, the underground victims return, and Doflamingo's secret rule begins collapsing in public.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: All the servants we've gathered over the past ten years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The hobi- Hobi curse is breaking!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Darling....!! How can we have forgot- ten about you all this time....?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: That's the nature of the curse!! I thought I would spend my whole life as a toy....!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: ...the toys are all turning into humans!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Aaaghh!! This one turned into a gorilla!!

summary: Sugar's Spell Shatters develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Sugar, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Dressrosa Citizens, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
